name: @tender/ai-sidecar
description: QVAC-powered local-first LLM sidecar for tendr.bid. Exposes an OpenAI-compatible HTTP API on port 11434 that the tendr.bid web app calls directly from the browser. Tendr's Next.js server is intentionally not in the AI data path - decrypted bid contents go from the buyer's browser straight to this sidecar.
